notes:
v1.2.6 Update
🐛 Cinematic Cut-in name placeholders: Actor cut-ins triggered from Visual Novel Maker now resolve Cinematic Cut-ins text placeholders such as {{name}} and {{alias}} before playback, including variation text.

announcement.title: 🌸 Visual Novel Maker v1.2.6
announcement.content:
Visual Novel Maker v1.2.6 fixes actor name placeholders in Cinematic Cut-ins.

  • Actor cut-ins triggered from Visual Novel Maker now resolve {{name}} and {{alias}} before playback.
  • Variation text is handled too, so randomized cut-in text no longer shows the raw placeholder.
